title: Prohibition of privy vaults and cesspools
doc_html:
§4003.  Prohibition of privy vaults and cesspools

Any municipal corporation, through its governing authority, may prohibit the construction of privy vaults and cesspools and suppress those already constructed.
doc_text:
§4003.  Prohibition of privy vaults and cesspools
Any municipal corporation, through its governing authority, may prohibit the construction of privy vaults and cesspools and suppress those already constructed.
